reviews.review_description: Sadly there is no update to this app. There is a room there some objects are flying in the air and so help you to know that the ones below are the ones that are new in the scene. Also there should be a dark in and out so that you do not magicaly see the objects appearing. I also find the size of objects in comparison to the player to big. I would recomment this app to kids that are newbies in vr for some first experience not more.
This app really improves your focus while having some fun and great for developing cognitive skills.

when a room is finished the button for go to next room does not work so you have to return to main menu to move on.
only bought today so only had a quick go will review again after i had more time to play
